title: Biden chaos, Soft landing secured? AI sentiment turns bearish, French elections
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros!

(4:29) Macro picture: Soft landing secured? Rate cut on the horizon? Plus: partisan economic perception

(20:48) AI sentiment turns bearish due to massive spend with little revenue

(40:51) A16Z's 20K GPU cluster

(46:41) Broad implications of France elections

(1:06:10) Hot swap update: President Biden holds firm as backers flee, press corps chaos, speed-run primary chances

analysis.summary: The episode discusses the current macroeconomic picture, AI sentiment turning bearish, and the implications of the French elections. The hosts also delve into the Biden campaign's struggles and the potential for a soft landing in the economy. Additionally, they touch on the topic of a 20,000 GPU cluster being built by A16Z.

takeaways.text: Rate cut may be on the horizon

quotes.text: Too much spend, too little benefit
quotes.speaker: Unknown

sentiment.notes: The hosts express caution about the current state of the economy and the Biden campaign's struggles, but also discuss potential positive developments such as a soft landing.
